label: create
detail: Global.create(ctx: PIDSScriptContext, state: object, pids: PIDSBlockEntity): void
documentation: Called when a PIDS is rendered for the first time. Used for initialization operations like creating dynamic textures.

label: render
detail: Global.render(ctx: PIDSScriptContext, state: object, pids: PIDSBlockEntity): void
documentation: Called at-most once per frame to draw contents onto the PIDS. Executed in a separate thread.

label: dispose
detail: Global.dispose(ctx: PIDSScriptContext, state: object, pids: PIDSBlockEntity): void
documentation: Called when a PIDS Block goes out of sight. Used for releasing memory and dynamic textures.

label: PIDSScriptContext
documentation: The context object used to pass rendering actions and manage Z-ordering for PIDS scripts.

label: getRenderManager
documentation: Obtain a RenderManager instance to render custom objects onto the Minecraft World at the block's position.

label: setAutoZOrdering
documentation: Enable or disable automatic Z-translation between drawing calls to prevent z-fighting.

label: setZOrderStep
documentation: Sets the custom translation distance (step) used for automatic Z-ordering. Default is 0.0002.

label: Text
documentation: Represents a text element to be drawn on the PIDS screen with various alignment and overflow options.

label: create
documentation: Creates a new text object for drawing on the PIDS.

label: pos
documentation: Sets the X and Y coordinate position of the text element.

label: size
documentation: Sets the bounding box width and height for the text, used for scaling and overflow mechanisms.

label: text
documentation: Sets the string content of the text object.

label: stretchXY
documentation: Overflow mechanism: Stretches the text on the overflowing axis to fit within the specified size.

label: marquee
documentation: Overflow mechanism: Automatically scrolls the text horizontally if it exceeds the size.

label: draw
documentation: Submits the text object to the rendering queue for the current frame.

label: Texture
documentation: Represents an image/texture element to be drawn on the PIDS screen.

label: create
documentation: Creates a new texture object for drawing on the PIDS.

label: texture
documentation: Sets the Identifier (Resource Location) for the PNG image or .mcmeta file.

label: uv
detail: Texture.uv(u1: float, v1: float, u2: float, v2: float): Texture
documentation: Sets the UV coordinates for mapping the texture.

label: PIDSBlockEntity
documentation: Provides information about the PIDS hardware (type, size) and current arrival data.

label: type
documentation: The type identifier of the PIDS (e.g., 'rv_pids', 'lcd_pids').

label: width
documentation: The full width of the available PIDS screen area.

label: arrivals
documentation: Returns the collection of arrivals currently obtained for this PIDS block.

label: ArrivalEntries
documentation: A list of arrival entries stopping at the platforms monitored by the PIDS.

label: get
documentation: Returns the arrival entry at index i. Returns null if no entry exists.

label: ArrivalEntry
documentation: Contains details about a specific approaching vehicle, including destination, time, and route info.

label: destination
documentation: Returns the name of the destination station or a custom destination string.

label: arrivalTime
documentation: Returns the epoch time in milliseconds when the vehicle will arrive.

label: carCount
documentation: Returns the number of cars (carriages) the vehicle consists of.

label: cars
documentation: Returns a list containing specific details for each individual car of the vehicle.
